steps.title: Apply the absolute value definition
steps.content:
When we have $|A| = B$ where $B > 0$, this means $A = B$ or $A = -B$.
So $|-5x + 13| = 73$ gives us two cases to solve:
$$-5x + 13 = 73 \quad \text{or} \quad -5x + 13 = -73$$

steps.title: Sum the solutions
steps.content:
Add the two solutions together:
$$-12 + \frac{86}{5} = \frac{-60}{5} + \frac{86}{5} = \frac{26}{5}$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
